result: If I could change the world in one way, I would want to foster greater empathy, compassion and understanding between all people. I believe so many of the world's problems stem from a lack of seeing things from others' perspectives and truly listening to one another with open minds and hearts. If we could all strive to better understand each others' experiences, beliefs, struggles and hopes, I think it would go a long way toward reducing conflict, prejudice and divisiveness. We're all human beings sharing this planet together. More empathy could help us find common ground, compromise, and work together for the greater good rather than fighting each other. It wouldn't solve everything, but I believe greater empathy and compassion would make the world a much better place. Of course, this is just my opinion. Others may have different perspectives on the most impactful way to change the world. What do you think?
